## Type

## Checklist
- [ ] Small and focused — one thing per PR
- [ ] Discussed in an issue first (for non-trivial changes)
- [ ] Tested locally; existing tests pass
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Updated docs / ARCHITECTURE.md if needed
- [ ] I understand this code and can support it
